Creating Memorable Moments in Zimbabwe

From elegant weddings to high-impact corporate functions and intimate private parties — Adora Events designs, plans, and delivers flawlessly. Professional planning with a proudly Zimbabwean touch.

Book Your Event Our Services

Our Services

Full-service event planning tailored to Zimbabwean celebrations, culture, and hospitality.

Weddings

Elegant, stress-free weddings. Venue sourcing, décor, coordination, roora & traditional ceremonies across Zimbabwe.

Corporate Events

Conferences, product launches, year-end functions and team-building. Professional AV, branding and seamless logistics.

Private Parties

Birthdays, anniversaries, bridal showers, baby showers and celebrations. Bespoke styling and unforgettable details.
